subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be God's eternal salutation and His everlasting splendor. This Wronged One findeth himself in an ocean of sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک سلام الله الابدی و بهائه السرمدی این مظلوم خود را در بحر حزن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastity and purity, @justice and wrath of God
